item.title: Fundviser Capital (India) Ltd Hits New 52-Week High at Rs.314.5
item.description: Fundviser Capital (India) Ltd, a key player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, reached a significant milestone today by hitting a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs.314.5. This marks a notable surge in the stock’s performance, reflecting strong momentum and a robust recovery after a brief period of decline. Time: 1 minute ago

item.title: Roopa Industries Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.40.01
item.description: Roopa Industries Ltd’s stock declined sharply to a new 52-week low of Rs.40.01 on 10 Mar 2026, marking a significant milestone in its recent price trajectory. This drop comes despite an initial gap-up opening and follows a brief two-day rally, reflecting ongoing pressures within the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector. Time: 1 minute ago

item.title: Magnum Ventures Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.18.99 Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Magnum Ventures Ltd, a player in the Paper, Forest & Jute Products sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.18.99 today, marking a significant decline amid broader market fluctuations and company-specific performance issues. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: JK Lakshmi Cement Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.605
item.description: JK Lakshmi Cement Ltd’s stock touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.605 today, marking a significant decline amid an extended period of negative returns. The stock has now recorded losses for eight consecutive trading sessions, cumulatively falling by 17.07% during this span, reflecting ongoing pressures within the cement sector and the company’s specific performance metrics. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Niraj Cement Structurals Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.27.5
item.description: Niraj Cement Structurals Ltd’s stock declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.27.5 today, marking a significant drop amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. The stock has now recorded a three-day consecutive fall, losing 5.17% over this period, and continues to trade below all key moving averages, reflecting sustained downward momentum. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: S J S Enterprises Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.02% Surge on 10 Mar 2026
item.description: S J S Enterprises Ltd demonstrated robust intraday performance on 10 Mar 2026, surging to an intraday high of Rs 1,683, marking a 5.95% rise within the session and closing with a notable 7.02% gain. This advance outpaced both its sector and the broader market, reflecting a significant rebound after two days of decline. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd Hits Intraday High with 3.38% Surge
item.description: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd demonstrated robust intraday performance on 10 Mar 2026, touching a day’s high of Rs 100.9, marking a 3.33% increase. This surge outpaced the broader Finance sector and the Sensex, reflecting notable trading momentum amid a mixed market backdrop. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Atlanta Electricals Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit on Strong Buying Momentum
item.description: Atlanta Electricals Ltd, a key player in the Heavy Electrical Equipment sector, surged to hit its upper circuit limit of 10% on 10 Mar 2026, closing at ₹1,008.60. This remarkable rally was driven by robust buying interest, resulting in a maximum permissible daily gain and triggering a regulatory trading freeze to contain volatility. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Synoptics Technologies Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Synoptics Technologies Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, surged to hit its upper circuit price limit on 10 Mar 2026, registering a maximum daily gain of 4.94%. This sharp rally was driven by robust buying interest, resulting in a regulatory freeze on further trading to contain volatility. Despite trading volumes remaining modest, the stock’s performance outpaced both its sector and the broader Sensex, signalling renewed investor enthusiasm. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Ritco Logistics Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Ritco Logistics Ltd witnessed a remarkable rally on 10 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit limit with a 16.92% gain, driven by robust buying interest and a surge in trading volumes. The stock outperformed its sector and benchmark indices, signalling a potential trend reversal after a prolonged decline. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: IFB Agro Industries Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: IFB Agro Industries Ltd witnessed a significant surge in its share price on 10 Mar 2026, hitting the upper circuit limit amid strong buying interest. The stock outperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting renewed investor confidence despite recent downward trends. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Computer Age Management Services Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Computer Age Management Services Ltd (CAMS) has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, reflecting a shift in market positioning and investor sentiment. The 10.7% increase in open interest, coupled with rising volumes and price gains, suggests growing directional bets amid evolving sector dynamics. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Mankind Pharma Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Rising Market Momentum
item.description: Mankind Pharma Ltd has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market participation and shifting investor positioning. The pharmaceutical mid-cap stock outperformed its sector peers on 10 Mar 2026, buoyed by increased volumes and a positive price trend after a brief correction. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Morarjee Textiles Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Morarjee Textiles Ltd (BZ series) surged to its upper circuit limit on 10 Mar 2026, closing at ₹6.60, marking a robust 3.61% gain on the day. The stock outperformed its sector and the broader Sensex, driven by intense buying interest and a significant unfilled demand, despite its micro-cap status and a recent downgrade to a Strong Sell rating by MarketsMOJO. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Hitachi Energy India Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Price Action
item.description: Hitachi Energy India Ltd (POWERINDIA) has witnessed a notable 13.12% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting positioning among traders. Despite a modest underperformance relative to its sector, the stock hit a new 52-week and all-time high of ₹26,325, reflecting a complex interplay between bullish sentiment and cautious profit-taking. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: TVS Electronics Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit on Robust Buying Momentum
item.description: TVS Electronics Ltd witnessed a remarkable surge on 10 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit limit with a maximum daily gain of 14.92%, driven by intense buying pressure and a significant spike in trading volumes. The stock closed at ₹392.35, marking a strong outperformance against its sector and the broader market indices. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Fertilizers & Chemicals Travancore Ltd Surges 20% to Hit Upper Circuit Amid Robust Buying Pressure
item.description: Fertilizers & Chemicals Travancore Ltd (FCTL) witnessed a remarkable surge on 10 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit limit with a 20% gain to close at ₹792.0. The stock outperformed its sector and the broader market, driven by intense buying interest and a significant volume spike, signalling strong investor confidence despite a recent downgrade in its Mojo Grade to Strong Sell. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Green Energy Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Adani Green Energy Ltd (ADANIGREEN) witnessed a notable 13.23% increase in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment on 10 Mar 2026, signalling heightened market activity and shifting positioning among traders. Despite a modest 0.18% gain in the stock price, the surge in OI alongside volume patterns and technical indicators suggests a complex interplay of directional bets and investor sentiment in the power sector. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: ABB India Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Market Signals
item.description: ABB India Ltd has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling increased market participation and potential directional bets. The stock’s recent price action, coupled with rising volumes and improved market positioning, suggests a bullish sentiment among traders and investors in the heavy electrical equipment sector. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: VL E-Governance & IT Solutions Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: VL E-Governance & IT Solutions Ltd witnessed a severe sell-off on 10 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit limit and closing at a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹11.36. The stock plunged by 9.44% intraday, reflecting intense panic selling and unfilled supply, as investor sentiment deteriorated sharply in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector. Time: 8 minutes ago
